title: Front Office Manager - Kumarakom Lake Resort - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Kumarakom Lake Resort - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Kumarakom Lake Resort are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort:
Kumarakom Lake Resort is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort!
